verses.1: A Song of Ascents. I will raise my eyes to the mountains; From where will my help come?
verses.2: My help comes from the LORD, Who made heaven and earth.
verses.3: He will not allow your foot to slip; He who watches over you will not slumber.
verses.4: Behold, He who watches over Israel Will neither slumber nor sleep.
verses.5: The LORD is your protector; The LORD is your shade on your right hand.
verses.6: The sun will not beat down on you by day, Nor the moon by night.
verses.7: The LORD will protect you from all evil; He will keep your soul.
verses.8: The LORD will guard your going out and your coming in From this time and forever.
